append_items.title: Review code-intelligence graph sources and consolidate derived-map procedures
append_items.mission: Review Code Review Graph, Codebase Memory MCP, and the current Understand Anything repository at pinned revisions; distinguish deterministic parser facts from heuristic, semantic, and LLM-generated relationships; define installation, configuration, persistence, privacy, model, cost, hook, watcher, UI, and repository-write boundaries; create only bounded first-party structural-map and change-impact procedures when they are distinct from the reviewed architecture and graph-projection core.
acceptance_tests: record exact source revisions and licenses for all reviewed repositories
record that the original Understand Anything bookmark now resolves to the current Egonex-AI repository
do not execute installers, binaries, MCP servers, hooks, watchers, dashboards, model calls, or repository indexing
keep generated graph and onboarding artifacts derived rather than canonical
verify consequential impact claims against source, configuration, history, tests, or runtime evidence
review overlapping package entries before adding local procedures
record lifecycle and installation decisions without rewriting imported package bodies
leave utility evaluation as a separate next item
